title: plocoglottis micrantha
intro: Plocoglottis micrantha, also known as the miniature Dendrobium, is a type of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Plocoglottis micrantha include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. Plocoglottis micrantha is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
